overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a wizarding school game showing a robed character exploring indoor environments. The character moves through a potions classroom, dark corridors, portrait-lined hallways, and a grand hall with a central fountain, featuring high-quality gothic architecture with warm lighting and other student NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: potions classroom with work tables and bookshelves

events.description: character walks through stone archway exiting the potions classroom into a darker corridor

agents.ego_description: walking around the potions classroom examining the work tables and equipment

entered.detail: wooden tables with potion equipment and cauldrons scattered across the room
tall wooden bookshelves filled with books against the stone walls
gothic stone archway serving as the exit from the classroom
medieval wall-mounted lanterns providing warm illumination

segments.scene_description: The character explores a dimly lit potions classroom with stone walls and gothic arches. Wooden work tables with equipment are scattered throughout, while tall bookshelves line the walls. Warm light from wall sconces illuminates the space as the character moves toward the stone archway exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow dark stone corridor with wooden door

events.description: character opens heavy wooden door revealing brighter corridor beyond

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark narrow corridor and opening the heavy wooden door at the end

entered.detail: rough stone walls of the narrow connecting corridor
heavy wooden door with metal studs that the character opens to proceed

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow, dimly lit stone corridor with rough walls. The space is tight and enclosed with minimal lighting. At the end of the corridor, the character approaches and opens a heavy wooden door, revealing a brighter space beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle corridor with framed portraits and carpet

events.description: emerging from dark corridor into well-lit portrait gallery with wall sconces
approaching large archway leading to the grand entrance hall

agents.ego_description: walking down the portrait-lined corridor toward the grand hall entrance

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking toward the camera in the corridor

entered.detail: ornate framed portraits of historical figures covering both walls of the corridor
decorative red carpet runner along the center of the corridor floor
large decorative stone archway marking the entrance to the grand hall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a well-lit corridor adorned with framed portraits on both walls and a red carpet runner. Wall sconces provide warm illumination. Another student walks toward the character from the far end. At the corridor's end, a grand archway opens into a vast hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand entrance hall with fountain and bifurcated staircase

events.description: entering the vast grand hall with high ceilings and sunlight streaming through gothic windows
beginning ascent of the grand bifurcated staircase
circling the central fountain statue at the top of the stairs

agents.ego_description: walking up the grand staircase and circling the central fountain among other students

notable_agents.action: group of students gathered near the base of the fountain conversing
student walking up the stairs alongside the character

entered.detail: magnificent bifurcated marble staircase with ornate railings splitting left and right
large multi-tiered fountain with a prominent horse and rider statue at the center
tall arched gothic windows streaming bright sunlight into the hall
stone balustrades lining the upper levels of the grand hall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a magnificent sunlit grand hall with soaring gothic architecture. A massive bifurcated staircase dominates the space, leading up to a balcony level. At the center stands an elaborate fountain with a horse statue. Other students mill about the floor and stairs as the character ascends, with sunlight streaming through high windows creating dramatic lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level corridor with portraits and wall benches

events.description: ascending the upper staircase away from the main hall level
entering the upper portrait gallery corridor with wall benches

agents.ego_description: climbing the upper stairs and walking through the upper corridor

notable_agents.action: student in robes walking ahead in the upper corridor

entered.detail: secondary marble staircase leading to the upper floor of the castle
additional framed portraits lining the walls of the upper corridor
wooden bench against the wall for seating in the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a secondary staircase from the grand hall balcony, leaving the fountain behind. The scene transitions to an upper corridor with more framed portraits, wall sconces, and wooden benches. Another student walks ahead as the character proceeds through this quieter, more intimate hallway space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic depths of a potions classroom into the soaring openness of a grand hall before settling into a quiet upper gallery. It begins amidst the stone arches and wooden work tables of a dimly lit classroom, moving through a narrow, rough-walled corridor that feels tight and enclosed. As the character opens a heavy wooden door, the space expands into a brightly lit hallway adorned with red carpets and framed portraits, leading directly toward a massive archway. The scene then opens into a magnificent sunlit grand hall featuring a bifurcated staircase and a central horse fountain, where dramatic light streams through high windows. Finally, the camera ascends a secondary staircase and leaves the bustling hall behind, transitioning into a more intimate upper corridor lined with wooden benches and silent portraits.
